name: JSContact
comment:
@docs decoder, JSContact

@docs Address, AddressComponent, AddressComponentKind, Addresses, Email, Emails, Kind, OnlineService, OnlineServices, Phone, Phones, PreferredLanguage, PreferredLanguages, RelatedTo, RelationType, UTCDateTime, Uid

unions.name: AddressComponentKind
unions.comment: The kind of the address component.

unions.name: Kind
unions.comment: The kind of the entity the Card represents

unions.name: RelationType
unions.comment: The variants define the relation type between the two objects.

aliases.name: Address
aliases.comment: The address of the entity represented by the Card
aliases.type: { contexts : List.List String.String, components : List.List JSContact.AddressComponent, isOrdered : Basics.Bool, countryCode : Maybe.Maybe String.String, coordinates : Maybe.Maybe String.String, timeZone : Maybe.Maybe String.String, full : Maybe.Maybe String.String, defaultSeparator : Maybe.Maybe String.String, pref : Maybe.Maybe Basics.Int, phoneticScript : Maybe.Maybe String.String, phoneticSystem : Maybe.Maybe String.String }

aliases.name: AddressComponent
aliases.comment:
The components that make up the address.
The component list MUST have at least one entry that has a kind property value other than "separator".
aliases.type: { value : String.String, kind : JSContact.AddressComponentKind, phonetic : Maybe.Maybe String.String }

aliases.name: Addresses
aliases.comment:
This section defines properties for postal addresses and geographical
locations associated with the entity represented by the Card

aliases.name: Email
aliases.comment: The email addresses in which to contact the entity represented by the Card.
aliases.type: { contexts : List.List String.String, address : String.String, pref : Maybe.Maybe Basics.Int }

aliases.name: Emails
aliases.comment: This section defines how properties contact the entity represented by the Card.

aliases.name: JSContact
aliases.type: { kind : JSContact.Kind, version : String.String, uid : JSContact.Uid, created : Maybe.Maybe JSContact.UTCDateTime, updated : Maybe.Maybe JSContact.UTCDateTime, language : Maybe.Maybe String.String, members : List.List JSContact.Uid, prodId : Maybe.Maybe String.String, relatedTo : Maybe.Maybe JSContact.RelatedTo, emails : Maybe.Maybe JSContact.Emails, addresses : Maybe.Maybe JSContact.Addresses, phones : Maybe.Maybe JSContact.Phones, onlineServices : Maybe.Maybe JSContact.OnlineServices, preferredLanguages : Maybe.Maybe JSContact.PreferredLanguages }

aliases.name: OnlineService
aliases.comment:
The online services that are associated with the entity represented by the
Card. This can be messaging services, social media profiles, and other.
aliases.type: { service : Maybe.Maybe String.String, user : Maybe.Maybe String.String, uri : String.String, contexts : List.List String.String, pref : Maybe.Maybe Basics.Int }

aliases.name: OnlineServices
aliases.comment: The online services in which to contact the entity represented by the Card

aliases.name: Phone
aliases.comment: A phone number by which to contact the entity represented by the Card
aliases.type: { contexts : List.List String.String, phone : String.String, pref : Maybe.Maybe Basics.Int }

aliases.name: Phones
aliases.comment: The phone numbers by which to contact the entity represented by the Card

aliases.name: PreferredLanguage
aliases.comment: A preferred language for contacting the entity associated with the Card
aliases.type: { language : String.String, contexts : List.List String.String, pref : Maybe.Maybe Basics.Int }

aliases.name: PreferredLanguages
aliases.comment: The preferred languages for contacting the entity associated with the Card.

aliases.name: RelatedTo
aliases.comment:
The set of Card objects that relate to the Card. The value is a map,
where each key is the uid property value of the related Card,
and the value defines the relation

aliases.name: UTCDateTime
aliases.comment: The UTCDateTime type is a String in "date-time" format [RFC3339]

aliases.name: Uid
aliases.comment:
An identifier that associates the object as the same across different systems,
address books, and views. The value SHOULD be a URN [RFC8141],
but for compatibility with [RFC6350], it MAY also be a URI [RFC3986] or free-text value.
The value of the URN SHOULD be in the "uuid" namespace [RFC9562].
[RFC9562] describes multiple versions of Universally Unique IDentifiers (UUIDs);
UUID version 4 is RECOMMENDED.
